defender_output.pass_1_analysis: The critic findings array is empty ([]), indicating that the adversarial reviewer identified no FATAL, MATERIAL, or MINOR issues with this methodology. The experiment design appears to have passed scrutiny across all dimensions: temporal split strategy is properly defendible against data leakage concerns; feature engineering appropriately isolates the text-learning hypothesis; evaluation metrics (PR-AUC) are correctly justified for the imbalanced security classification setting; preprocessing controls prevent target leakage; and the confound controls (metadata ablation, sender memorization analysis, calibration separate from discrimination) are explicitly designed. With no advancing findings to rebut, the methodology retains its original form and the defense is complete by default.
